Event: The Twilight Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 06/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI191
Dark Scale Ring

When the enemy unit uses a resurrection or healing ability, they take 204800 pure damage, and the cooldown of their resurrection abilities is increased by 3,5 sec. The ability can be triggered only once in 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
